2606.20246.title: Finetuning Vision-Language-Action Models Requires Fewer Layers Than You Think
2606.20246.paper_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models pre-trained on massive video-robot datasets have revolutionized robotic manipulation, yet their multi-billion parameter architectures impose prohibitive computational burdens during downstream fine-tuning and real-time inference. In this work, we reveal a highly non-trivial architectural characteristic of these continuous control foundation policies (e.g., pi_0, GR00T-N1.5): despite being trained on diverse physical trajectories, they exhibit severe layer-wise representational redundancy. To exploit this, we introduce a structural compression pipeline that is entirely training-free, bypassing the need of existing methods to load full-scale models to learn optimized token reductions or dynamic layer selectors. Instead, using only a single forward pass via Centered Kernel Alignment to identify redundant layer features, we remove twin layers to permanently compress the model depth by up to 50% across both the VLM backbone and the continuous control policy head. Downstream fine-tuning of this streamlined architecture yields a dual acceleration benefit: a 40-50% reduction in training time and up to 30% faster real-time inference, while matching or exceeding full-scale base model performance. We comprehensively validate our method across three simulation benchmarks (LIBERO, RoboCasa, SimplerEnv) and 10 diverse real-world manipulation tasks across 4 unique robotic embodiments. These results prove that advanced VLAs require significantly fewer layers than previously assumed, offering a highly compute-efficient paradigm for scalable robot learning.
2606.20246.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型在龐大的視頻-機器人數據集上進行預訓練，徹底改變了機器人操作，然而它們的數十億參數架構在下游微調和實時推斷過程中帶來了高昂的計算負擔。<lb/>在本研究中，我們揭示了這些連續控制基礎策略（例如，pi_0，GR00T-N1.5）的一個高度非平凡的架構特徵：儘管在多樣的物理軌跡上進行訓練，但它們在層級表示上存在嚴重的冗餘。<lb/>為了利用這一點，我們提出了一種完全無需訓練的結構壓縮管道，繞過現有方法需要加載全尺度模型以學習優化的標記減少或動態層選擇器的需求。<lb/>相反，僅使用一次前向傳播通過中心核對齊來識別冗餘層特徵，我們移除了雙層，將模型深度永久壓縮最多50%，適用於VLM主幹和連續控制策略頭。<lb/>這種精簡架構的下游微調帶來了雙重加速效益：訓練時間減少40-50%，實時推斷速度提高最多30%，同時匹配或超越全尺度基準模型的性能。<lb/>我們在三個模擬基準（LIBERO、RoboCasa、SimplerEnv）和四種獨特機器人實體的10個多樣化現實世界操作任務中全面驗證了我們的方法。<lb/>這些結果證明，先進的VLA需要的層數顯著少於先前的假設，為可擴展的機器人學習提供了一個高計算效率的範式。
2606.20246.author: Gia-Binh Nguyen et.al.
2606.20246.authors: Gia-Binh Nguyen, Trong-Bao Ho, Thien-Loc Ha, Khoa Vo, Philip Lund Møller, Quang T. Nguyen, Long Dinh, Tuan Dam, Vu Duong, Tung M. Luu, Trung Le, Tran Nguyen Le, Minh Vu, An Thai Le, Ngan Le, Daniel Sonntag, James Zou, Jan Peters, Duy M. H. Nguyen, Ngo Anh Vien
